member.name: M:MassTransit.AzureBusFactory.CreateUsingServiceBus(System.Action{MassTransit.IServiceBusBusFactoryConfigurator})
member.summary: Configure and create a bus for Azure Service Bus (later, we'll use Event Hubs instead)
member.param: The configuration callback to configure the bus

member.name: T:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.ClientContext
member.summary: The client context is used to access the queue/subscription/topic client.

member.name: P:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.ClientContext.InputAddress
member.summary: The input address for the client/transport

member.name: P:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.ClientContext.EntityPath
member.summary: The path of the messaging entity

member.name: P:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.ClientContext.IsClosedOrClosing
member.summary: True if the client or connection is closed or closing
Register an message handler for the client
Register a message session handler

member.name: M:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.ClientContext.StartAsync
member.summary: Starts the message/session receivers

member.name: M:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.ClientContext.ShutdownAsync
member.summary: Shutdown the message/session receivers

member.name: M:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.ClientContext.CloseAsync
member.summary: Close down the message handler on the received

member.name: M:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.ClientContext.NotifyFaulted(System.Exception,System.String)
member.summary: Notify that an exception has occurred on the client which is not transient and requires a recycle

member.name: P:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.ClientSettings.MaxConcurrentCalls
member.summary: The number of concurrent messages to process

member.name: P:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.ClientSettings.PrefetchCount
member.summary: The number of messages to push from the server to the client

member.name: P:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.ClientSettings.MaxAutoRenewDuration
member.summary: The timeout before the session state is renewed

member.name: P:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.ClientSettings.SessionIdleTimeout
member.summary: The timeout before a message session is abandoned

member.name: P:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.ClientSettings.MaxConcurrentCallsPerSession
member.summary: The maximum number of concurrent calls per session

member.name: P:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.ClientSettings.Path
member.summary: The path of the message entity

member.name: P:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.ClientSettings.Name
member.summary: The name of the message entity

member.name: M:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.ClientSettings.GetInputAddress(System.Uri,System.String)
member.summary: Get the input address for the client on the specified host

member.name: M:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.Configuration.IServiceBusHostConfiguration.ApplyEndpointDefinition(MassTransit.IServiceBusReceiveEndpointConfigurator,MassTransit.IEndpointDefinition)
member.summary: Apply the endpoint definition to the receive endpoint configurator

member.name: P:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.Configuration.ISessionIdSendTopologyConvention.DefaultFormatter
member.summary: The default, non-message specific routing key formatter used by messages when no specific convention has been specified.

member.name: T:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.Configuration.SubscriptionConsumeTopologySpecification
member.summary: Used to bind an exchange to the consuming queue's exchange

member.name: T:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.ConnectionContext
member.summary: Service Bus Connection Context

member.name: P:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.ConnectionContext.Endpoint
member.summary: The Azure Service Bus endpoint, which is a Uri, but without any path information.

member.name: M:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.ConnectionContext.CreateQueue(Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus.Administration.CreateQueueOptions)
member.summary: Create a queue in the host namespace (which is scoped to the full ServiceUri)

member.name: M:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.ConnectionContext.CreateTopic(Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus.Administration.CreateTopicOptions)
member.summary: Create a topic in the root namespace

member.name: M:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.ConnectionContext.CreateTopicSubscription(Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus.Administration.CreateSubscriptionOptions,Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus.Administration.CreateRuleOptions,Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus.Administration.RuleFilter)
member.summary: Create a topic subscription

member.name: M:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.ConnectionContext.DeleteTopicSubscription(Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus.Administration.CreateSubscriptionOptions)
member.summary: Delete a subscription from the topic

member.name: T:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.IServiceBusHost
member.summary: An Azure ServiceBus Host, which caches the messaging factory and namespace manager

member.summary: Create a subscription endpoint on the host, which can be stopped independently from the bus
member.param: The subscription name for this endpoint
Configuration callback for the endpoint

member.summary: Create a subscription endpoint on the host, which can be stopped independently from the bus
member.param: The subscription name for this endpoint
The topic name to subscribe for this endpoint
Configuration callback for the endpoint

member.summary: A context for a message consumed within a message session

member.summary: The SessionId of the session

member.summary: The session is locked until...

member.summary: Returns the state as a stream

member.summary: Writes the message state from the specified stream

member.name: M:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.MessageSessionContext.RenewLockAsync(Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus.ServiceBusReceivedMessage)
member.summary: Renews the session lock

member.name: T:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.Middleware.DeadLetterQueueFilter
member.summary: Moves a message to the dead-letter queue, rather than the _skipped queue

member.name: T:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.Middleware.DeadLetterQueueExceptionFilter
member.summary: Moves a faulted message to the dead-letter queue, rather than the _error queue

member.name: T:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.Middleware.MessageReceiverFilter
member.summary: Creates a message receiver and receives messages from the input queue of the endpoint

member.name: T:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.Middleware.MessageSessionReceiverFilter
member.summary: Creates a message session receiver

member.name: T:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.Middleware.ServiceBusMessageSchedulerFilter
member.summary: Adds the service bus message scheduler filter

member.name: T:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.NamespaceContext
member.summary: A service bus namespace which has the appropriate messaging factories available

member.summary: The path of the messaging entity

member.summary: Send the message to the messaging entity

member.name: M:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.SendEndpointContext.ScheduleSend(Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus.ServiceBusMessage,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Schedule a send in the future to the messaging entity

member.summary: Cancel a previously schedule send on the messaging entity

member.summary: The settings for sending to an endpoint

member.summary: The path of the messaging entity

member.summary: The queue details used to declare the queue to Azure Service Bus

member.summary: The exchange to queue binding details to declare the binding to RabbitMQ

member.summary: The subscription that binds them

member.summary: A subscription, as defined

member.name: T:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.Topology.Topic
member.summary: The exchange details used to declare the exchange to Azure Service Bus

member.name: T:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.Topology.TopicSubscription
member.summary: A subscription that forwards to another topic

member.name: P:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.Topology.TopicSubscription.Source
member.summary: The source topic

member.name: P:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.Topology.TopicSubscription.Destination
member.summary: The destination topic

member.name: P:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.Topology.TopicSubscription.Subscription
member.summary: The subscription that binds them together

member.name: M:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.Topology.EntityNameFormatter.FormatDeadLetterPath(System.String)
member.summary: Formats the dead letter path for either a queue, or a subscription.
member.param: The name of the queue, or path of the subscription.
member.returns: The path as a string of the dead letter entity.

member.name: M:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.Topology.EntityNameFormatter.FormatErrorPath(System.String)
member.summary: Formats the dead letter path for either a queue, or a subscription.
member.param: The name of the queue, or path of the subscription.
member.returns: The path as a string of the dead letter entity.

member.name: M:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.Topology.EntityNameFormatter.FormatSubQueuePath(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Formats the subqueue path for either a queue, or a subscription.
member.param: The name of the queue, or path of the subscription.
The name of the subQueue
member.returns: The path as a string of the subqueue entity.

member.name: M:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.Topology.EntityNameFormatter.FormatSubscriptionPath(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Formats the subscription path, based on the topic path and subscription name.
member.param: The name of the topic, including slashes.
The subscription name

member.summary: Creates a topic
member.param: The immutable topic options
member.returns: An entity handle used to reference the exchange in subsequent calls

member.summary: Creates a subscription
member.param: The source exchange
member.returns: An entity handle used to reference the binding in subsequent calls

member.summary: Creates a subscription which forwards to a different topic

The destination topic
member.returns: An entity handle used to reference the binding in subsequent calls

member.summary: Creates a queue
Creates a subscription which forwards to a queue

member.name: T:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.Topology.IPublishEndpointBrokerTopologyBuilder
member.summary: A builder for creating the topology when publishing a message

member.name: P:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.Topology.IPublishEndpointBrokerTopologyBuilder.Topic
member.summary: The topic to which the message is published

member.name: M:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.Topology.IPublishEndpointBrokerTopologyBuilder.CreateImplementedBuilder
member.summary: Create an implemented builder which can be passed to implemented types

member.name: T:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.Topology.IReceiveEndpointBrokerTopologyBuilder
member.summary: A unique builder context should be created for each specification, so that the items added by it can be combined together into a group - so that if a subsequent specification yanks something that conflicts, the system can yank the group or warn that it's impacted.

member.name: P:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.Topology.IReceiveEndpointBrokerTopologyBuilder.Queue
member.summary: A handle to the consuming queue

member.name: T:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.Topology.ISendEndpointBrokerTopologyBuilder
member.summary: A builder for creating the topology when publishing a message

member.name: P:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.Topology.ISendEndpointBrokerTopologyBuilder.Queue
member.summary: The topic to which the message is published

member.name: T:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.Topology.ISubscriptionEndpointBrokerTopologyBuilder
member.summary: A unique builder context should be created for each specification, so that the items added by it can be combined together into a group - so that if a subsequent specification yanks something that conflicts, the system can yank the group or warn that it's impacted.

member.name: P:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.Topology.ISubscriptionEndpointBrokerTopologyBuilder.Topic
member.summary: A handle to the subscription topic

member.name: P:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.Topology.PublishEndpointBrokerTopologyBuilder.Topic
member.summary: The topic where the published message is sent

member.name: P:MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTestHarnessOptions.CleanNamespace
member.summary: Remove all topics, queues, and subscriptions from the service bus namespace when starting the test harness (via a hosted service)

member.name: M:MassTransit.IServiceBusBusFactoryConfigurator.Send``1(System.Action{MassTransit.IServiceBusMessageSendTopologyConfigurator{``0}})
member.summary: Configure the send topology of the message type

member.name: M:MassTransit.IServiceBusBusFactoryConfigurator.Publish``1(System.Action{MassTransit.IServiceBusMessagePublishTopologyConfigurator{``0}})
member.summary: Configure the send topology of the message type

member.name: M:MassTransit.IServiceBusBusFactoryConfigurator.OverrideDefaultBusEndpointQueueName(System.String)
member.summary: In most cases, this is not needed and should not be used. However, if for any reason the default bus endpoint queue name needs to be changed, this will do it. Do NOT set it to the same name as a receive endpoint or you will screw things up.

member.name: M:MassTransit.IServiceBusBusFactoryConfigurator.SetNamespaceSeparatorToTilde
member.summary: Sets the namespace separator to tilde instead of slash, which is compatible with managed identities and RBAC.

member.name: M:MassTransit.IServiceBusBusFactoryConfigurator.SetNamespaceSeparatorToUnderscore
member.summary: Sets the namespace separator to underscore instead of slash, which is compatible with managed identities and RBAC. This is automatically set when using a managed identity token provider.

member.name: M:MassTransit.IServiceBusBusFactoryConfigurator.SetNamespaceSeparatorTo(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the namespace separator to the specified string instead of slash.

member.name: M:MassTransit.IServiceBusBusFactoryConfigurator.Host(MassTransit.ServiceBusHostSettings)
member.summary: Configures a host

member.name: M:MassTransit.IServiceBusBusFactoryConfigurator.SubscriptionEndpoint``1(System.String,System.Action{MassTransit.IServiceBusSubscriptionEndpointConfigurator})
member.summary: Declare a subscription endpoint on the broker and configure the endpoint settings and message consumers

member.name: M:MassTransit.IServiceBusBusFactoryConfigurator.SubscriptionEndpoint(System.String,System.String,System.Action{MassTransit.IServiceBusSubscriptionEndpointConfigurator})
member.summary: Declare a subscription endpoint on the broker and configure the endpoint settings and message consumers
member.param: The name of the subscription
The topic name to subscribe

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusEndpointConfigurator.MaxConcurrentCalls
member.summary: Specify the number of concurrent consumers (separate from prefetch count)

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusEndpointConfigurator.AutoDeleteOnIdle
member.summary: True if the queue should be deleted if idle

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusEndpointConfigurator.DefaultMessageTimeToLive
member.summary: Set the default message time to live in the queue

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusEndpointConfigurator.EnableBatchedOperations
member.summary: Sets a value that indicates whether server-side batched operations are enabled

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusEndpointConfigurator.EnableDeadLetteringOnMessageExpiration
member.summary: Move messages to the dead letter queue on expiration (time to live exceeded)

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusEndpointConfigurator.ForwardDeadLetteredMessagesTo
member.summary: Sets the path to the recipient to which the dead lettered message is forwarded.

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusEndpointConfigurator.LockDuration
member.summary: Specify the lock duration for messages read from the queue

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusEndpointConfigurator.MaxDeliveryCount
member.summary: Sets the maximum delivery count. A message is automatically dead-lettered after this number of deliveries.

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusEndpointConfigurator.RequiresSession
member.summary: Sets the queue in session mode, requiring a session for inbound messages

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusEndpointConfigurator.MaxConcurrentCallsPerSession
member.summary: If session is required, sets the maximum concurrent calls per session (defaults to 1)

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusEndpointConfigurator.UserMetadata
member.summary: Sets the user metadata.

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusEndpointConfigurator.MessageWaitTimeout
member.summary: Sets the message session timeout period

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusEndpointConfigurator.SessionIdleTimeout
member.summary: Sets the message session idle timeout period

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusEndpointConfigurator.MaxAutoRenewDuration
member.summary: Sets the maximum time for locks/sessions to be automatically renewed

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusEndpointEntityConfigurator.LockDuration
member.summary: Specify the lock duration for messages read from the queue

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusEndpointEntityConfigurator.MaxDeliveryCount
member.summary: Sets the maximum delivery count. A message is automatically dead lettered after this number of deliveries.

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusEndpointEntityConfigurator.RequiresSession
member.summary: Sets the subscription in session mode, requiring a session for inbound messages

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusEndpointEntityConfigurator.MaxConcurrentCallsPerSession
member.summary: Sets the maximum number of concurrent calls per session

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusEndpointEntityConfigurator.EnableDeadLetteringOnMessageExpiration
member.summary: Move messages to the dead letter queue on expiration (time to live exceeded)

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusEndpointEntityConfigurator.ForwardDeadLetteredMessagesTo
member.summary: Sets the path to the recipient to which the dead lettered message is forwarded.

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusEntityConfigurator.AutoDeleteOnIdle
member.summary: True if the queue should be deleted if idle

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusEntityConfigurator.DefaultMessageTimeToLive
member.summary: Set the default message time to live in the queue

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusEntityConfigurator.EnableBatchedOperations
member.summary: Sets a value that indicates whether server-side batched operations are enabled

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusEntityConfigurator.UserMetadata
member.summary: Sets the user metadata.

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusHostConfigurator.NamedKeyCredential
member.summary: The named key to use to connect to the Service Bus
member.remarks: This property cannot be used if or is being used.

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusHostConfigurator.SasCredential
member.summary: The shared access signature to use to connect to the Service Bus
member.remarks: This property cannot be used if or is being used.

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusHostConfigurator.TokenCredential
member.summary: The token credential to use to connect to the Service Bus
member.remarks: This property cannot be used if or is being used.

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusHostConfigurator.ConnectionString
member.summary: The connection string to use to connect to the Service Bus
member.remarks: If a credential is not part of the connection string, one of the other authentication methods needs to be used. or or

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusHostConfigurator.RetryMinBackoff
member.summary: The minimum back off interval for the exponential retry policy

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusHostConfigurator.RetryMaxBackoff
member.summary: The maximum back off interval for the exponential retry policy

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusHostConfigurator.RetryLimit
member.summary: The retry limit for service bus operations

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusHostConfigurator.TransportType
member.summary: Sets the messaging protocol to use with the messaging factory, defaults to AMQP TCP.

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusMessageEntityConfigurator.Path
member.summary: The entity path

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusMessageEntityConfigurator.BasePath
member.summary: The base path for the message entity

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusMessageEntityConfigurator.FullPath
member.summary: The full path of the message entity

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusMessageEntityConfigurator.DuplicateDetectionHistoryTimeWindow
member.summary: How long of a window to use to detect duplicate messages

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusMessageEntityConfigurator.EnablePartitioning
member.summary: Sets a value that indicates whether the queue to be partitioned across multiple message brokers is enabled

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusMessageEntityConfigurator.MaxSizeInMegabytes
member.summary: Sets the maximum size of the queue in megabytes, which is the size of memory allocated for the queue

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusMessageEntityConfigurator.MaxMessageSizeInKilobytes
member.summary: Set the maximum message size, in kilobytes

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusMessageEntityConfigurator.RequiresDuplicateDetection
member.summary: Sets the value indicating if this queue requires duplicate detection.

member.name: M:MassTransit.IServiceBusMessageEntityConfigurator.EnableDuplicateDetection(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Enable duplicate detection on the queue, specifying the time window
member.param: The time window for duplicate history

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusQueueConfigurator.EnableDeadLetteringOnFilterEvaluationExceptions
member.summary: Move messages to the dead letter queue on filter evaluation exception

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusQueueConfigurator.ForwardTo
member.summary: Sets the path where messages are forwarded to

member.name: M:MassTransit.IServiceBusQueueConfigurator.GetCreateQueueOptions
member.summary: Create the CreateQueueOptions for the configuration

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusQueueEndpointConfigurator.DuplicateDetectionHistoryTimeWindow
member.summary: Sets the TimeSpan structure that defines the duration of the duplicate detection history. The default value is 10 minutes

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusQueueEndpointConfigurator.EnablePartitioning
member.summary: Sets a value that indicates whether the queue to be partitioned across multiple message brokers is enabled

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusQueueEndpointConfigurator.MaxSizeInMegabytes
member.summary: Sets the maximum size of the queue in megabytes, which is the size of memory allocated for the queue

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusQueueEndpointConfigurator.MaxMessageSizeInKilobytes
member.summary: Set the maximum message size, in kilobytes

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusQueueEndpointConfigurator.RequiresDuplicateDetection
member.summary: Sets the value indicating if this queue requires duplicate detection.

member.name: M:MassTransit.IServiceBusQueueEndpointConfigurator.EnableDuplicateDetection(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Enable duplicate detection on the queue, specifying the time window
member.param: The time window for duplicate history

member.name: T:MassTransit.IServiceBusReceiveEndpointConfigurator
member.summary: Configure an Azure Service Bus receive endpoint

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusReceiveEndpointConfigurator.RemoveSubscriptions
member.summary: If true, on shutdown, the subscriptions added are removed. This is used to avoid auto-delete queues from creating abandoned subscriptions on the topic, resulting in a quota overflow.

member.name: M:MassTransit.IServiceBusReceiveEndpointConfigurator.Subscribe(System.String,System.String,System.Action{MassTransit.IServiceBusSubscriptionConfigurator})
member.summary: Create a topic subscription on the endpoint
member.param: The topic name
The name for the subscription
Configure the exchange and binding

member.name: M:MassTransit.IServiceBusReceiveEndpointConfigurator.Subscribe``1(System.String,System.Action{MassTransit.IServiceBusSubscriptionConfigurator})
member.summary: Create a topic subscription for the message type
member.param: The name for the subscription
Configure the topic subscription

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusSubscriptionConfigurator.TopicPath
member.summary: The path of the subscription's topic

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusSubscriptionConfigurator.SubscriptionName
member.summary: The subscription name, unique per topic

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusSubscriptionConfigurator.ForwardTo
member.summary: Sets the path where messages are forwarded to

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusSubscriptionConfigurator.EnableDeadLetteringOnFilterEvaluationExceptions
member.summary: Move messages to the dead letter queue on filter evaluation exception

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusSubscriptionConfigurator.Filter
member.summary: Specify the filter for the subscription

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusSubscriptionConfigurator.Rule
member.summary: Specify a rule for the subscription

member.name: T:MassTransit.IServiceBusSubscriptionEndpointConfigurator
member.summary: Configure an Azure Service Bus receive endpoint

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusSubscriptionEndpointConfigurator.Filter
member.summary: Specify the filter for the subscription

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusSubscriptionEndpointConfigurator.Rule
member.summary: Specify a rule for the subscription

member.name: P:MassTransit.IServiceBusTopicConfigurator.SupportOrdering
member.summary: If True, the topic will deliver messages to subscriptions in order

member.name: M:MassTransit.MessageSessionSagaRepositoryConfigurationExtensions.MessageSessionRepository``1(MassTransit.ISagaRegistrationConfigurator{``0})
member.summary: Configures the saga to use the Azure Service Bus session for saga persistence.

member.name: M:MassTransit.MessageSessionSagaRepositoryConfigurationExtensions.SetMessageSessionSagaRepositoryProvider(MassTransit.IRegistrationConfigurator)
member.summary: Use the Azure Service Bus session saga repository for sagas configured by type (without a specific generic call to AddSaga/AddSagaStateMachine)

member.name: M:MassTransit.ServiceBusBusFactoryConfiguratorExtensions.Host(MassTransit.IServiceBusBusFactoryConfigurator,System.Uri,System.Action{MassTransit.IServiceBusHostConfigurator})
member.summary: Adds a service bus host using the MassTransit style URI host name
member.param: The bus factory configurator
The host address, in MassTransit format (sb://namespace.servicebus.windows.net/scope)
A callback to further configure the service bus

member.name: M:MassTransit.ServiceBusBusFactoryConfiguratorExtensions.Host(MassTransit.IServiceBusBusFactoryConfigurator,System.Uri,Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus.ServiceBusClient,Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus.Administration.ServiceBusAdministrationClient)
member.summary: Adds a service bus host using the MassTransit style URI host name with the pre-configured clients.
member.param: The bus factory configurator
The host address, in MassTransit format (sb://namespace.servicebus.windows.net/scope)
A pre-configured client used to perform message operations on the Service Bus
A pre-configured client to perform namespace operations on the Service Bus

member.name: M:MassTransit.ServiceBusBusFactoryConfiguratorExtensions.Host(MassTransit.IServiceBusBusFactoryConfigurator,System.String,System.Action{MassTransit.IServiceBusHostConfigurator})
member.summary: Adds a Service Bus host using a connection string (Endpoint=...., etc.).
member.param: The bus factory configurator
The connection string in the proper format
A callback to further configure the service bus

member.name: M:MassTransit.ServiceBusBusFactoryConfiguratorExtensions.ReceiveEndpoint(MassTransit.IServiceBusBusFactoryConfigurator,System.Action{MassTransit.IServiceBusReceiveEndpointConfigurator})
member.summary: Declare a ReceiveEndpoint using a unique generated queue name. This queue defaults to auto-delete and non-durable. By default all services bus instances include a default receiveEndpoint that is of this type (created automatically upon the first receiver binding).

member.name: M:MassTransit.ServiceBusBusFactoryConfiguratorExtensions.ReceiveEndpoint(MassTransit.IServiceBusBusFactoryConfigurator,MassTransit.IEndpointDefinition,System.Action{MassTransit.IServiceBusReceiveEndpointConfigurator})
member.summary: Declare a receive endpoint using the endpoint .

member.name: M:MassTransit.ServiceBusConfigurationExtensions.CreateUsingAzureServiceBus(MassTransit.IBusFactorySelector,System.Action{MassTransit.IServiceBusBusFactoryConfigurator})
member.summary: Configure and create a bus for Azure Service Bus
member.param: Hang off the selector interface for visibility
The configuration callback to configure the bus

member.name: M:MassTransit.ServiceBusConfigurationExtensions.UsingAzureServiceBus(MassTransit.IBusRegistrationConfigurator,System.Action{MassTransit.IBusRegistrationContext,MassTransit.IServiceBusBusFactoryConfigurator})
member.summary: Configure MassTransit to use Azure Service Bus for the transport.
member.param: The registration configurator (configured via AddMassTransit)
The configuration callback for the bus factory

member.summary: Configure MassTransit to use Azure Service Bus for the transport.
member.param: The registration configurator (configured via AddMassTransit)
The configuration callback for the bus factory

member.name: M:MassTransit.ServiceBusDependencyInjectionTestingExtensions.ConfigureServiceBusTestOptions(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTestHarnessOptions})
member.summary: Specify the test and/or the test inactivity timeouts that should be used by the test harness.

member.name: T:MassTransit.ServiceBusHostSettings
member.summary: The host settings used to configure the service bus connection

member.name: P:MassTransit.ServiceBusHostSettings.ServiceUri
member.summary: The address of the service bus namespace (and accompanying service scope)

member.name: P:MassTransit.ServiceBusHostSettings.ServiceBusClient
member.summary: A custom client that will be used instead of one defined by the settings provided here.

member.name: P:MassTransit.ServiceBusHostSettings.ServiceBusAdministrationClient
member.summary: A custom administration client that will be used instead of one defined by the settings provided here.

member.name: P:MassTransit.ServiceBusHostSettings.NamedKeyCredential
member.summary: The named key to use to connect to the Service Bus
member.remarks: This property cannot be used if or is being used.

member.name: P:MassTransit.ServiceBusHostSettings.SasCredential
member.summary: The shared access signature to use to connect to the Service Bus
member.remarks: This property cannot be used if or is being used.

member.name: P:MassTransit.ServiceBusHostSettings.TokenCredential
member.summary: The token credential to use to connect to the Service Bus
member.remarks: This property cannot be used if or is being used.

member.name: P:MassTransit.ServiceBusHostSettings.ConnectionString
member.summary: The connection string to use to connect to the Service Bus
member.remarks: If a credential is not part of the connection string, one of the other authentication methods needs to be used. or or

member.name: P:MassTransit.ServiceBusHostSettings.RetryMinBackoff
member.summary: The minimum back off interval for the exponential retry policy

member.name: P:MassTransit.ServiceBusHostSettings.RetryMaxBackoff
member.summary: The maximum back off interval for the exponential retry policy

member.name: P:MassTransit.ServiceBusHostSettings.RetryLimit
member.summary: The retry limit for service bus operations

member.name: P:MassTransit.ServiceBusHostSettings.TransportType
member.summary: The type of transport to use AMQP TCP or AMQP Websockets

member.name: M:MassTransit.ServiceBusMessageSchedulerBusExtensions.CreateServiceBusMessageScheduler(MassTransit.IBus)
member.summary: Create a message scheduler that uses the Azure Service Bus ScheduleEnqueueTimeUtc property to schedule messages. NOTE that this should only be used to schedule messages outside of a message consumer. Consumers should use the ScheduleSend extensions on ConsumeContext.

member.name: M:MassTransit.ServiceBusMessageSchedulerBusExtensions.CreateServiceBusMessageScheduler(MassTransit.ISendEndpointProvider,MassTransit.IBusTopology)
member.summary: Create a message scheduler that uses the Azure Service Bus ScheduleEnqueueTimeUtc property to schedule messages. NOTE that this should only be used to schedule messages outside of a message consumer. Consumers should use the ScheduleSend extensions on ConsumeContext.

member.name: M:MassTransit.ServiceBusMessageSchedulerBusExtensions.AddServiceBusMessageScheduler(MassTransit.IRegistrationConfigurator)
member.summary: Add an to the container that uses the Azure message enqueue time to schedule messages.

member.name: M:MassTransit.ServiceBusMessageSchedulerBusExtensions.AddServiceBusMessageScheduler``1(MassTransit.IBusRegistrationConfigurator{``0})
member.summary: Add an to the container that uses the Azure message enqueue time to schedule messages.

member.name: M:MassTransit.ServiceBusReceivePipeConfiguratorExtensions.ConfigureDeadLetterQueueDeadLetterTransport(MassTransit.IReceivePipelineConfigurator)
member.summary: Configure the receive endpoint to use the Azure dead-letter queue instead of the _skipped queue

member.name: M:MassTransit.ServiceBusReceivePipeConfiguratorExtensions.ConfigureDeadLetterQueueErrorTransport(MassTransit.IReceivePipelineConfigurator)
member.summary: Generate a event and move the message to the Azure dead-letter queue for the queue/subscription

member.name: M:MassTransit.ServiceBusScheduleMessageExtensions.UseServiceBusMessageScheduler(MassTransit.IBusFactoryConfigurator)
member.summary: Uses the Enqueue time of Service Bus messages to schedule future delivery of messages instead of using Quartz. A natively supported feature that is highly reliable.

member.name: M:MassTransit.IServiceBusConsumeTopologyConfigurator.Subscribe(System.String,System.String,System.Action{MassTransit.IServiceBusSubscriptionConfigurator})
member.summary: Create a topic subscription on the endpoint

The name for the subscription
Configure the exchange and binding

member.summary: Use the session id formatter for the specified message type

member.summary: Use the delegate to format the session id, using Empty if the string is null upon return

member.name: T:MassTransit.IMessageReceiver
member.summary: Called by an Azure Function to handle messages using configured consumers, sagas, or activities

member.name: M:MassTransit.IMessageReceiver.Handle(System.String,Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus.ServiceBusReceivedMessage,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Configure all registered consumers, sagas, and activities on the receiver and handle the message
member.param: The input entity name, used for the receiver InputAddress
The Service Bus message

member.name: M:MassTransit.IMessageReceiver.Handle(System.String,System.String,Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus.ServiceBusReceivedMessage,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Configure all registered consumers, sagas, and activities on the receiver and handle the message
member.param: The input entity name, used for the receiver InputAddress
The subscription name, should match the trigger
The Service Bus message

member.summary: Configure the specified consumer on the receiver and handle the message

The Service Bus message

member.name: T:MassTransit.ServiceBusMessageContext
member.summary: The context of a Message from AzureServiceBus - gives access to the transport message when requested.

member.name: M:MassTransit.ServiceBusPublishTopologyConfigurationExtensions.AddPublishMessageTypesFromNamespaceContaining``1(MassTransit.IServiceBusBusFactoryConfigurator,System.Action{MassTransit.IServiceBusMessagePublishTopologyConfigurator,System.Type},System.Func{System.Type,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Adds any valid message types found in the specified namespace to the publish topology

member.summary: Adds any valid message types found in the specified namespace to the publish topology
member.param: The type to use to identify the assembly and namespace to scan

member.summary: Adds the specified message types to the publish topology

member.name: P:MassTransit.ServiceBusSendContext.ScheduledEnqueueTimeUtc
member.summary: Set the time at which the message should be enqueued, which is essentially scheduling the message for future delivery to the queue.

member.name: P:MassTransit.ServiceBusSendContext.SessionId
member.summary: Set the sessionId of the message

member.name: P:MassTransit.ServiceBusSendContext.ReplyToSessionId
member.summary: Set the replyToSessionId of the message

member.name: P:MassTransit.ServiceBusSendContext.ReplyTo
member.summary: Sets the ReplyTo address of the message

member.name: P:MassTransit.ServiceBusSendContext.Label
member.summary: Set the application specific label of the message

member.name: M:MassTransit.ServiceBusSendContextExtensions.SetScheduledEnqueueTime(MassTransit.SendContext,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Set the time at which the message should be delivered to the queue
member.param: The scheduled time for the message

member.name: M:MassTransit.ServiceBusSendContextExtensions.SetScheduledEnqueueTime(MassTransit.SendContext,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Set the time at which the message should be delivered to the queue
member.param: The time to wait before the message should be enqueued

member.summary: Handle the Azure Service Bus message using the specified consumer

member.summary: Apply the entire topology to the builder

member.summary: Returns the topic options for the message type

member.name: M:MassTransit.IServiceBusMessagePublishTopology.Apply(MassTransit.AzureServiceBusTransport.Topology.IPublishEndpointBrokerTopologyBuilder)
member.summary: Apply the message topology to the builder, including any implemented types
member.param: The topology builder

member.name: M:MassTransit.IServiceBusPublishTopology.FormatSubscriptionName(System.String)
member.summary: Formats a subscription name to be 50 characters if it is greater than 50 characters.

member.name: M:MassTransit.IServiceBusPublishTopology.GenerateSubscriptionName(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Generate a subscription name that is less than 50 characters, using the entity name and host address
member.param: The entity name of the destination queue or topic
The absolute path of the host, which is usually the scope

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullWhenAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified return value condition.
member.param: The return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated parameter will not be null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullWhenAttribute.ReturnValue
member.summary: Gets the return value condition.
